expectations.text: Produces a 6-row scorecard table on 0–10 scale plus overall
Overall score is 4.0 or lower (this is a major stretch)
IC vs leader score is 4 or lower (resume is IC/player-coach, role is pure leadership)
Industry score is 4 or lower (B2B SaaS vs healthtech/regulated)
Gap analysis names healthtech/regulated industry, manager-of-managers, and HIPAA/FDA experience as missing
expectations.evidence: All three named explicitly in gaps 1, 2, 3

expectations.text: Bottom-line recommendation is pass (or apply only with major caveats)
expectations.evidence: Bottom line: Pass. This isn't a stretch role — it's a different career.
